topics.title: GSC opportunity review: Last Z Alliance Duel Guide — Schedule, Day 1–6 Plan, and VS Strategy
topics.source_reference: GSC weekly 2026-05-17: page opportunity and query-page signals
topics.notes: This is a clear existing-page opportunity with strong GSC signals and a well-matched event-guide archetype. The query intent appears aligned to an existing Events page, and the proposal fits the prefer-update-existing rule without requiring new content. Prior run `2026-05-10-alliance-duel-gsc-opportunity-llm-approved-intake` is `closed`; keep this topic in monitoring unless new evidence materially changes the opportunity.
topics.player_value: Helps players find schedule, day-by-day plan, and matchup strategy faster from the existing Alliance Duel page.
topics.duplication_risk: Low, because the topic maps to an established event-guide page and does not require a new page if scope stays within the current cluster role.
claims_to_verify: Whether the current page already satisfies the dominant query intent better than a rewrite.
Whether the proposed improvements can be made without changing the page beyond approved scope.
topics.next_step: Have an editor confirm query intent, first-screen usefulness, and whether the current page can cover the search need without broad scope changes.
evidence: GSC page signal: alliance-duel.html had 8912 impressions, 434 clicks, 4.87% CTR, avg position 6.10.

site_fit.primary_user_job: Improve query-to-page match and first-screen usefulness for `last z vs schedule` searchers.
site_fit.archetype_reason: Existing page is `event-guide` in the `Events` cluster; Scout should prefer updating the existing page before proposing new content.

constraints: Use existing page template and navigation patterns.
Treat GSC data as a signal, not proof that a rewrite is needed.
reject_if: The query intent is already better served by another canonical page.
The proposed change would blur cluster role separation.
The improvement cannot be expressed without changing a cornerstone page beyond the approved scope.

closeout.note: Owner approved exact Alliance Duel schedule/content intent changes. Manual apply was used for first-screen/meta operations, followed by strict QA.

topics.title: GSC opportunity review: Last Z Redeem Codes — Active Codes, Gift Center Login, and UID
topics.source_reference: GSC weekly 2026-05-17: page opportunity and query-page signals
topics.notes: This is the highest-value page opportunity by volume, with multiple low-CTR gift-center queries pointing at the existing codes page. It is still a high-risk page because the canonical gift-center claims must be protected and cluster roles should remain distinct, but the signal is strong enough for human review. Prior run `2026-05-05-codes-gsc-opportunity-llm-approved-intake` is `closed`; keep this topic in monitoring unless new evidence materially changes the opportunity.
topics.player_value: Improves how players reach redeem codes and Gift Center login help from the current cornerstone page.
topics.duplication_risk: Medium, because gift-center intent can overlap with UID, login, and redeem flow topics if cluster separation is not preserved.
claims_to_verify: That the gift-center-only redeem flow remains accurate and unchanged.
That Gift Center mailbox reward handling and UID guidance are still correct.
That the page can absorb the query intent without violating cluster role separation.
topics.next_step: Review the current codes page against the protected canonical claims and confirm whether a scoped update can improve query match without blurring other Economy pages.
evidence: GSC page signal: codes.html had 40033 impressions, 733 clicks, 1.83% CTR, avg position 6.01.
Low CTR query: `last z gift center` had 3169 impressions, 121 clicks, 3.82% CTR, position 6.58.
Low CTR query: `last z gift center login` had 903 impressions, 46 clicks, 5.09% CTR, position 5.14.
Low CTR query: `lastz gift center` had 683 impressions, 29 clicks, 4.25% CTR, position 5.96.
Low CTR query: `last-z.com gift center` had 508 impressions, 25 clicks, 4.92% CTR, position 6.00.

site_fit.primary_user_job: Improve query-to-page match and first-screen usefulness for `last z gift center` searchers.
site_fit.archetype_reason: Existing page is `cornerstone-guide` in the `Economy` cluster; Scout should prefer updating the existing page before proposing new content.

constraints: Use existing page template and navigation patterns.
Treat GSC data as a signal, not proof that a rewrite is needed.
Protect canonical claim `gift-center-only-redeem-flow`.
Protect canonical claim `gift-rewards-mailbox`.
Protect canonical claim `gift-center-cluster-role-separation`.
Existing backlog history for this page: gift-center-ctr-pass:done.
reject_if: The query intent is already better served by another canonical page.
The proposed change would blur cluster role separation.
The improvement cannot be expressed without changing a cornerstone page beyond the approved scope.

closeout.note: Owner-reviewed no-op proposal. Current codes.html first-screen and metadata already match the intended codes hub role; no content change applied.

topics.notes: This is worth human review as a verification task, not as a copy source. The official domain may help validate routing and flow accuracy for an existing Economy support page, but the claim set must be independently confirmed before any content work.

topics.duplication_risk: High, because this likely overlaps with existing Gift Center and codes intent and may duplicate established coverage.
claims_to_verify: Official service routing for Gift Center.
Whether the Gift Center flow differs from current canonical guidance.
Whether this topic adds a distinct user job beyond existing Economy coverage.
topics.next_step: Verify the official routing and flow against canonical site memory and one additional reliable source before deciding whether the current page needs a scoped update.
evidence: Official service domain is the strongest source for Gift Center routing and redeem/store flow validation.
